name: Almond Connection Link Win
description: This game is a bright and satisfying puzzle game where your goal is to connect matching dots and fill the entire board with paths. Each line forms a tiny connection, and every level brings a fresh challenge for your logic and attention.
instructions: Connect matching dots Find pairs of the same color and draw a line between them Avoid crossing paths Lines cannot overlap or block each other Fill the whole board Use every cell to complete the level Difficulty increases
